functions.name: ConfirmDialog
params:
{
  isOpen,
  title,
  message,
  confirmLabel = 'Confirm',
  cancelLabel = 'Cancel',
  variant = 'info',
  onConfirm,
  onCancel,
}

functions.name: DeleteConfirmDialog
params:
{
    open,
    onOpenChange,
    projectId,
    projectName,
    entityCount = 0,
    modifiedAt,
    filePath,
    onDeleted,
}
